description.overview: The Curly-Coated Retriever is the most elegant and graceful of all retrievers. Their distinctive curly coat and proud bearing set them apart.
description.history: The Curly-Coated Retriever originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being intelligent, independent, confident.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their tight, crisp curls coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The Curly-Coated Retriever is the most elegant and graceful of all retrievers. Their distinctive curly coat and proud bearing set them apart.
